titleStmt.title: SII 9.665: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 665. (A.R. No. 1 of 1917.) ON A PILLAR SET UP IN THE COURT-YARD OF THE RANGANATHA TEMPLE AT PAILABANDA, MADAKASIRA TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1478; Naḷa, Pushya, śu 8 corresponding to A.D. 1556 December 10, Thursday (not verifiable), in the reign of Sadāśivarāya-Mahārāya. It records that, under the orders of the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāmarāja-Tirumalarājayyadēva-Mahāarasu, the Mahānāyakāchārya Timmaṇa-Nāyaka of Niḍugal, the Gauḍas and Sēnabōvas of Niḍugalla-sīme, together with the merchants, made a gift of the village of Tūmukuṇṭe in Niḍugal-rājya for the service of the god Tiruveṅgaḷanātha of Peyalabaṇḍe in the presence of Gutti-Tirumalarājayyadēva and Keṁchappa-Nāyaka. The gift was made for the merit of Gutti-Tirumalarājayyadēva; and the date on which it was actually made was Pusyha, śu. 11.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrījayādbhudayaśālivāhanaśakavaruṣaṁ
gaḷu 1428 neya naḷasaṁvatsarada puṣya śu 8 lu sva
stisamastalōkaikanātha caturdaśabhuvanādhī
śvara Anādinātha Ādinārāyaṇa śrīvaikuṁ
ṭhanivāsa Akhiḷāṇḍakōṭibrahmaṇḍanā
yaka śrīpurāṇapuruṣōttama śrī peya
labaṁḍeya tiruveṁgaḷanāthana divyaśrīpā
dapadmaṁgaḷige śrīmadrājādhirāja rājapara
mēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīsadāśivarāya
mahārāyarugaḷu ratnasiṁhasanārūḍha
rāgi pruthvīrājyaṁgaiyuttaṁ Iralu śrī
ma(ṁ)nmahamaṁḍalēśvara rāmarāju
tirumalarājayyadēvamahāarasugaḷa
nirūpadiṁdalū śrīma(ṁ)nmmahānāyka
cāryya niḍugala tiṁmaṇanāykaru niḍu
gallasīmeya prajegaḷu tailagereya rāmagau
ṁḍa sēnabōva nāgappa sivarada nāgēgōṁḍa
cikkasivarada basavigōṁḍa sēnabōva puṭa
pa sigalahaḷi cinagōṁḍa sēnabōva Ellama
rasa tavara mūruvāgila tippagōṁḍa jājura cika
ṇa sēnabōva busuvappa guḍubaṁḍe parcigau
ṁḍa sēnabōva sūrappa baragūra cikkēgōṁḍa
sēnabōva nārāyaṇa yivaru muṁtāda gauḍapra
jegaḷu seṭṭipaṭṭaṇasvāmigaḷu sahavāgi niḍu
gallarājyadoḷagaṇa tūmukuṁṭegrāmama
nu guttitirumalarājayyana muṁde manu
śyaru keṁcapanāyka(ka)ra muṁdiṭṭuko
ṁḍu svāmige pādarcane nityapūje nai
vēdya māsapūje paṁcaparva naṁdādīpa
Aṁgaraṁgavaibhava rathōtsaha sahavāgi yi
ṣṭu naḍeyabēkeṁdu puṣya śu 11 pu(ṁ)ṇyakā
ladalu sahira(ṁ)ṇyōdakadānadhārāpūrva
kavāgi dhāreneradu koṭṭusamarpisidevā
gi Ā grāmake saluva catusīmege voḷagā
da suvarnadāya keṟe kuṁṭe kāluve Ēta
kapile gūḍe guyyalu suṁka suvarnadāya
gade beddalu saha sakala suvarnnadāya sakala
bhattadāya nidhi nikṣēpa jala pāṣāṇa A
kṣīṇi Āgāmi sidha svā(ṁ)myaṁgaḷeṁba
Aṣṭabōga tēja svāmya sahavāgi sahira(ṁ)
ṇyōdakadānadhārāpūrvakavāgi guttitiruma
larājayyadēvamahāarasugaḷige pu(ṁ)ṇya
vāgabēkeṁdu dhāreneredu koṭu sa
marpisideU . svadattadviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattā
nupālanaṁ paradattāpahārēṇa svadattāṁ niṣpha
laṁ bhavēttu .
Digital edition of SII 9.665 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
